name: Mediating Personalities
descriptionTemplate:
"24" gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}:
{Chaos}: The Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG of "24" +[StateArg4]%. Each time a Posse is used, the Exalt Final DMG of "24" +[StateArg1]%.
{Aequor}: The DMG "24" deals enjoys a [StateArg2]% {Tentacle DMG} bonus and inflicts {Poison} equal to 10% of DMG dealt. "24"'s Exalt can trigger 50% {Poison} on enemies.
{Caro}: For every 1 Arithmetica "24" consumes, {Embryo Fusion} +[Blood:DescArg1], "24" gains [StateArg3] {STR}. Her Exalt enjoys an additional 300% {STR} bonus.
{Ultra}: The DMG "24" deals enjoys a [StateArg5]% {Counter} DMG Bonus. Shuffle 1 {Insight} into the Discard Pile at turn end, Hand Limit +2.
